Name: Matthew Richert
If yes:: UCL / medial elbow tightness or pain, Shoulder impingement or pain
For your most significant injury: what h: Summer 2024: UCL strain. Went to a sports orthopedic and he told me to wear a brace for a month or so. I didn't throw the entire summer (3-4 months) and then did a slow ramp up the entire fall. Now I occasionally feel some soreness in that area when I throw, but never any pain.
Any areas you're currently managing or k: Area around the right scap gets pretty sore after a pitching outing. Working on it with trainer through cupping and scrapping, along with some other exercises. Area on top/front of the shoulder also tightens up occasionally on me. Typically fight it with advil and stretching.
Lifting experience: Advanced (3+ years, comfortable with all compound movements)
What's the #1 thing you want from this s: Have a good arm care plan and schedule. I want to know what to do when I get into the gym and how to do it.
